title: saxifraga retusa subsp. wulfeniana
intro: Saxifraga retusa subsp. wulfeniana, also known as Alpine Saxifrage, is a subalpine plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Alpine Saxifrage include its potential to protect against oxidative stress and promote wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Alpine Saxifrage can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Europe.
